rag_rules: Use validator diagnostics to identify and fix specific AGREE syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing the root cause of the error, not by adding unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate component type or implementation scope
Ensure all AGREE expressions have valid types and are properly declared
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` for valid AGREE syntax
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix AGREE syntax errors
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use undefined identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
